Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(********************************************************************************************

 The slice category is regular and exact

 One key theorem about regular categories is that they are closed under slicing.

 To prove this theorem, we characterize regular epimorphisms in the slice category `C/x` as
 regular epimorphisms in  `C`. Note that for this characterization we use that `C` is regular,
 because that allows us to characterize regular epimorphisms as extremal epimorphisms. With
 this in place, we can directly prove that the slice category is regular. In addition, we
 prove that the pullback functor and the codomain functor preserve regular epimorphisms under
 suitable assumptions.

 We also show that exact categories are closed under slicing. This proofs boils down to
 showing that every internal equivalence relation in `C/x` gives rise to one in `C`.

 Contents
 1. Regular epimorphisms in the slice category
 2. Regular categories are closed under slicing
 3. Preservation of regular epimorphisms by the pullback functor
 4. Preservation of regular epimorphisms by the codomain functor
 5. Exact category

 ********************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coequalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Epis.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EpiFacts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.RegularAndExact.RegularEpi.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.RegularAndExact.RegularCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.RegularAndExact.RegularEpiFacts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.RegularAndExact.ExactCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fiber.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.FiberCod.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.CodColimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.CodMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.CodLimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.CodFunctor.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * 1. Regular epimorphisms in the slice category *)

C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi (dom_mor hp)
is_regular_epi hp


C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi (dom_mor hp)
is_regular_epi hp

  
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
is_regular_epi (dom_mor hp) → is_regular_epi hp

  
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
isaprop (is_regular_epi hp)
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
(∑ (w : C) (g₁ g₂ : C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧)
 (p : g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp),
 isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p)
→ is_regular_epi hp

  
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
isaprop (is_regular_epi hp)

    apply isaprop_is_regular_epi.
  
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
(∑ (w : C) (g₁ g₂ : C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧)
 (p : g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp),
 isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p)
→ is_regular_epi hp

  
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: ∑ (w : C) (g₁ g₂ : C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧)
(p : g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp),
isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
is_regular_epi hp

  
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
is_regular_epi hp

  
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
∑ (w : C / x) (g₁ g₂ : C / x ⟦ w, yg₁ ⟧)
(p : g₁ · hp = g₂ · hp), isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ hp p

p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
C / x

C / x ⟦ ?pr1, yg₁ ⟧

x: C

C / x ⟦ ?pr1, yg₁ ⟧

x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
?pr10 · hp = ?pr11 · hp
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
(λ p0 : ?pr10 · hp = ?pr11 · hp,
 isCoequalizer ?pr10 ?pr11 hp p0) ?pr12

  
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
C / x
 exact (make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor yg₁)).

x: C

H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
C / x ⟦ make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor yg₁), yg₁ ⟧

H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
C ⟦ cod_dom (make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor yg₁)),
cod_dom yg₁ ⟧

p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
?g · cod_mor yg₁ =
cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor yg₁))

x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧

p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
C ⟦ cod_dom (make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor yg₁)),

 exact g₁.
    
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
g₁ · cod_mor yg₁ =
cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor yg₁))
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         apply idpath).

p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp

cod_dom yg₁ ⟧

yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C

p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
?g · cod_mor yg₁ =
cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor yg₁))

    
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
C ⟦ cod_dom (make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor yg₁)),
cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
 exact g₂.
    
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
g₂ · cod_mor yg₁ =
cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor yg₁))
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite <- (mor_eq hp) ; cbn ;
         rewrite !assoc ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         exact (!p)).
  
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
make_cod_fib_mor g₁
  (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof C x yg₁ w g₁) · hp =
make_cod_fib_mor g₂
  (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof0 C x yg₁ zg₂ hp w
     g₁ g₂ p) · hp
 abstract
      (use eq_mor_cod_fib ;
       rewrite !comp_in_cod_fib ; cbn ;
       exact p).
  
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
(λ p0 : make_cod_fib_mor g₁
          (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof C x yg₁ w
             g₁) · hp =
        make_cod_fib_mor g₂
          (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof0 C x yg₁
             zg₂ hp w g₁ g₂ p) · hp,
 isCoequalizer
   (make_cod_fib_mor g₁
      (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof C x yg₁ w g₁))
   (make_cod_fib_mor g₂
      (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof0 C x yg₁ zg₂
         hp w g₁ g₂ p)) hp p0)
  (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof1 C x yg₁ zg₂ hp w
     g₁ g₂ p)
 
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor g₁
     (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof C x yg₁ w g₁))
· dom_mor hp =
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor g₂
     (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof0 C x yg₁ zg₂ hp
        w g₁ g₂ p)) · dom_mor hp
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
isCoequalizer
  (dom_mor
     (make_cod_fib_mor g₁
        (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof C x yg₁ w g₁)))
  (dom_mor
     (make_cod_fib_mor g₂
        (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof0 C x yg₁ zg₂
           hp w g₁ g₂ p))) (dom_mor hp) ?p'

    
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor g₁
     (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof C x yg₁ w g₁))
· dom_mor hp =
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor g₂
     (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof0 C x yg₁ zg₂ hp
        w g₁ g₂ p)) · dom_mor hp
 exact p.
    
C: category
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom yg₁ ⟧
p: g₁ · dom_mor hp = g₂ · dom_mor hp
H: isCoequalizer g₁ g₂ (dom_mor hp) p
isCoequalizer
  (dom_mor
     (make_cod_fib_mor g₁
        (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof C x yg₁ w g₁)))
  (dom_mor
     (make_cod_fib_mor g₂
        (to_regular_epi_in_slice_subproof0 C x yg₁ zg₂
           hp w g₁ g₂ p))) (dom_mor hp) p
 exact H.
Qed.


C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
is_regular_epi (dom_mor hp)

PB: Pullbacks C

x: C

C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
is_z_isomorphism g

  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
is_z_isomorphism g

  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
is_z_isomorphism g

C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂ = cod_mor yg₁

    exact (mor_eq hp).
  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
is_z_isomorphism g

HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C

yg₁, zg₂: C / x

z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g

q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
φ:= make_cod_fib_mor f q₁: C / x ⟦ yg₁, wh ⟧
is_z_isomorphism g

C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
φ:= make_cod_fib_mor f q₁: C / x ⟦ yg₁, wh ⟧
q₂: g · cod_mor zg₂ = cod_mor wh
ψ:= make_cod_fib_mor g q₂: C / x ⟦ wh, zg₂ ⟧
q₃: hp = φ · ψ
Hψ: isMonic ψ
H':= is_extremal_epi_strong_epi
  (is_strong_epi_regular_epi H) wh φ ψ q₃ Hψ: is_z_isomorphism ψ
is_z_isomorphism g

  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C

z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g

q₂: g · cod_mor zg₂ = cod_mor wh
ψ:= make_cod_fib_mor g q₂: C / x ⟦ wh, zg₂ ⟧
q₃: hp = φ · ψ
Hψ: isMonic ψ

  (is_strong_epi_regular_epi H) wh φ ψ q₃ Hψ: is_z_isomorphism ψ
C ⟦ cod_dom zg₂, z ⟧
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
φ:= make_cod_fib_mor f q₁: C / x ⟦ yg₁, wh ⟧
q₂: g · cod_mor zg₂ = cod_mor wh
ψ:= make_cod_fib_mor g q₂: C / x ⟦ wh, zg₂ ⟧
q₃: hp = φ · ψ
Hψ: isMonic ψ
H':= is_extremal_epi_strong_epi
  (is_strong_epi_regular_epi H) wh φ ψ q₃ Hψ: is_z_isomorphism ψ
is_inverse_in_precat g ?g

  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
φ:= make_cod_fib_mor f q₁: C / x ⟦ yg₁, wh ⟧
q₂: g · cod_mor zg₂ = cod_mor wh
ψ:= make_cod_fib_mor g q₂: C / x ⟦ wh, zg₂ ⟧
q₃: hp = φ · ψ
Hψ: isMonic ψ
H':= is_extremal_epi_strong_epi
  (is_strong_epi_regular_epi H) wh φ ψ q₃ Hψ: is_z_isomorphism ψ
C ⟦ cod_dom zg₂, z ⟧
 exact (pr11 H').
  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
φ:= make_cod_fib_mor f q₁: C / x ⟦ yg₁, wh ⟧
q₂: g · cod_mor zg₂ = cod_mor wh
ψ:= make_cod_fib_mor g q₂: C / x ⟦ wh, zg₂ ⟧
q₃: hp = φ · ψ
Hψ: isMonic ψ

  (is_strong_epi_regular_epi H) wh φ ψ q₃ Hψ: is_z_isomorphism ψ
is_inverse_in_precat g (pr11 H')
 
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
φ:= make_cod_fib_mor f q₁: C / x ⟦ yg₁, wh ⟧
q₂: g · cod_mor zg₂ = cod_mor wh
ψ:= make_cod_fib_mor g q₂: C / x ⟦ wh, zg₂ ⟧
q₃: hp = φ · ψ
Hψ: isMonic ψ
H':= is_extremal_epi_strong_epi
  (is_strong_epi_regular_epi H) wh φ ψ q₃ Hψ: is_z_isomorphism ψ
g · pr11 H' = identity z

Hψ: isMonic ψ
H':= is_extremal_epi_strong_epi
  (is_strong_epi_regular_epi H) wh φ ψ q₃ Hψ: is_z_isomorphism ψ
pr11 H' · g = identity (cod_dom zg₂)

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
φ:= make_cod_fib_mor f q₁: C / x ⟦ yg₁, wh ⟧
q₂: g · cod_mor zg₂ = cod_mor wh
ψ:= make_cod_fib_mor g q₂: C / x ⟦ wh, zg₂ ⟧
q₃: hp = φ · ψ
Hψ: isMonic ψ
H':= is_extremal_epi_strong_epi
  (is_strong_epi_regular_epi H) wh φ ψ q₃ Hψ: is_z_isomorphism ψ
g · pr11 H' = identity z
 
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
φ:= make_cod_fib_mor f q₁: C / x ⟦ yg₁, wh ⟧
q₂: g · cod_mor zg₂ = cod_mor wh
ψ:= make_cod_fib_mor g q₂: C / x ⟦ wh, zg₂ ⟧
q₃: hp = φ · ψ
Hψ: isMonic ψ
H':= is_extremal_epi_strong_epi
  (is_strong_epi_regular_epi H) wh φ ψ q₃ Hψ: is_z_isomorphism ψ
g · pr11 H' = dom_mor (ψ · pr1 H')

      
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
φ:= make_cod_fib_mor f q₁: C / x ⟦ yg₁, wh ⟧
q₂: g · cod_mor zg₂ = cod_mor wh
ψ:= make_cod_fib_mor g q₂: C / x ⟦ wh, zg₂ ⟧
q₃: hp = φ · ψ
Hψ: isMonic ψ
H':= is_extremal_epi_strong_epi
  (is_strong_epi_regular_epi H) wh φ ψ q₃ Hψ: is_z_isomorphism ψ
g · pr11 H' = dom_mor ψ · dom_mor (pr1 H')

      apply idpath.
    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
φ:= make_cod_fib_mor f q₁: C / x ⟦ yg₁, wh ⟧
q₂: g · cod_mor zg₂ = cod_mor wh
ψ:= make_cod_fib_mor g q₂: C / x ⟦ wh, zg₂ ⟧
q₃: hp = φ · ψ
Hψ: isMonic ψ
H':= is_extremal_epi_strong_epi
  (is_strong_epi_regular_epi H) wh φ ψ q₃ Hψ: is_z_isomorphism ψ
pr11 H' · g = identity (cod_dom zg₂)
 
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
φ:= make_cod_fib_mor f q₁: C / x ⟦ yg₁, wh ⟧
q₂: g · cod_mor zg₂ = cod_mor wh
ψ:= make_cod_fib_mor g q₂: C / x ⟦ wh, zg₂ ⟧
q₃: hp = φ · ψ
Hψ: isMonic ψ
H':= is_extremal_epi_strong_epi
  (is_strong_epi_regular_epi H) wh φ ψ q₃ Hψ: is_z_isomorphism ψ
pr11 H' · g = dom_mor (pr1 H' · ψ)

      
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
H: is_regular_epi hp
z: C
f: C ⟦ cod_dom yg₁, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, cod_dom zg₂ ⟧
p: dom_mor hp = f · g
Hg: isMonic g
wh:= make_cod_fib_ob (g · cod_mor zg₂) : C / x: C / x
q₁: f · (g · cod_mor zg₂) = cod_mor yg₁
φ:= make_cod_fib_mor f q₁: C / x ⟦ yg₁, wh ⟧
q₂: g · cod_mor zg₂ = cod_mor wh
ψ:= make_cod_fib_mor g q₂: C / x ⟦ wh, zg₂ ⟧
q₃: hp = φ · ψ
Hψ: isMonic ψ
H':= is_extremal_epi_strong_epi
  (is_strong_epi_regular_epi H) wh φ ψ q₃ Hψ: is_z_isomorphism ψ
pr11 H' · g = dom_mor (pr1 H') · dom_mor ψ

      apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
is_regular_epi hp ≃ is_regular_epi (pr1 hp)


C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
is_regular_epi hp ≃ is_regular_epi (pr1 hp)

  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
is_regular_epi hp → is_regular_epi (pr1 hp)
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
is_regular_epi (pr1 hp) → is_regular_epi hp
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
isaprop (is_regular_epi hp)
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
isaprop (is_regular_epi (pr1 hp))

  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
is_regular_epi hp → is_regular_epi (pr1 hp)
 apply (from_regular_epi_in_slice PB EC HC).
  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
is_regular_epi (pr1 hp) → is_regular_epi hp
 apply to_regular_epi_in_slice.
  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
isaprop (is_regular_epi hp)
 apply isaprop_is_regular_epi.
  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yg₁, zg₂: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yg₁, zg₂ ⟧
isaprop (is_regular_epi (pr1 hp))
 apply isaprop_is_regular_epi.
Defined.

(** * 2. Regular categories are closed under slicing *)
Section SliceRegular.
  Context {C : category}
          (PB : Pullbacks C)
          (EC : coeqs_of_kernel_pair C)
          (HC : regular_epi_pb_stable C)
          (x : C).

  Section CoeqSlice.
    Context {yf zg : C/x}
            (hp : yf --> zg)
            (K : kernel_pair hp).

    Let y : C := cod_dom yf.
    Let z : C := cod_dom zg.
    Let f : y --> x := cod_mor yf.
    Let g : z --> x := cod_mor zg.
    Let h : y --> z := dom_mor hp.

    Let pk : C/x := PullbackObject K.
    Let p : C := cod_dom pk.
    Let k : p --> x := cod_mor pk.

    Let qπ₁ : pk --> yf := PullbackPr1 K.
    Let π₁ : p --> y := dom_mor qπ₁.
    Let qπ₂ : pk --> yf := PullbackPr2 K.
    Let π₂ : p --> y := dom_mor qπ₂.

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pk:= K: C / x
p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π₁ · h = π₂ · h

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pk:= K: C / x
p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π₁ · h = π₂ · h

      
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pk:= K: C / x
p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π₁ · h = dom_mor (PullbackPr1 K · hp)
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pk:= K: C / x
p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
dom_mor (PullbackPr2 K · hp) = π₂ · h

      
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x

K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C

f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧

C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧

π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π₁ · h = dom_mor (PullbackPr1 K) · dom_mor hp

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧

C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pk:= K: C / x
p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
dom_mor (PullbackPr2 K) · dom_mor hp = π₂ · h

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C

qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧

C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧

π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
C ⟦ ?d, y ⟧
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pk:= K: C / x
p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
C ⟦ ?d, y ⟧
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pk:= K: C / x
p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
?p1 · h = ?p2 · h
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pk:= K: C / x
p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
isPullback ?H

yf, zg: C / x

y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

p:= cod_dom pk: C

 abstract
            (exact (PullbackSqrCommutes K)).
        
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧

isPullback to_kernel_pair_slice_subproof
 exact (isPullback_Pullback K).
    Defined.

    Let Coeq : Coequalizer π₁ π₂ := EC y z h to_kernel_pair_slice.

PB: Pullbacks C

z:= cod_dom zg: C

g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧

qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧

C ⟦ Coeq, x ⟧

PB: Pullbacks C

y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C

g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧

π₁ · f = π₂ · f
 abstract
          (exact (mor_eq qπ₁ @ !(mor_eq qπ₂))).
    Defined.

PB: Pullbacks C

p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
Coeq:= EC y z h to_kernel_pair_slice: Coequalizer π₁ π₂
C / x ⟦ yf, coeq_of_kernel_pair_slice_ob ⟧

      
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pk:= K: C / x
p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
Coeq:= EC y z h to_kernel_pair_slice: Coequalizer π₁ π₂
C ⟦ cod_dom yf, cod_dom coeq_of_kernel_pair_slice_ob ⟧

?g · cod_mor coeq_of_kernel_pair_slice_ob = cod_mor yf

g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧

C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pk:= K: C / x
p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
Coeq:= EC y z h to_kernel_pair_slice: Coequalizer π₁ π₂
CoequalizerArrow Coeq
· cod_mor coeq_of_kernel_pair_slice_ob = cod_mor yf
 abstract
          (cbn ; unfold coeq_of_kernel_pair_slice_ob_mor ;
           rewrite CoequalizerCommutes ;
           apply idpath ).
    Defined.

g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧

qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧

C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pk:= K: C / x
p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧

π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧

· dom_mor coeq_of_kernel_pair_slice_coeq_arr =
dom_mor (PullbackPr2 K)
· dom_mor coeq_of_kernel_pair_slice_coeq_arr

      apply CoequalizerEqAr.
    Qed.

C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
yf, zg: C / x
hp: C / x ⟦ yf, zg ⟧
K: kernel_pair hp
y:= cod_dom yf: C
z:= cod_dom zg: C
f:= cod_mor yf: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g:= cod_mor zg: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pk:= K: C / x
p:= cod_dom pk: C
k:= cod_mor pk: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
qπ₁:= PullbackPr1 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₁:= dom_mor qπ₁: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
qπ₂:= PullbackPr2 K: C / x ⟦ pk, yf ⟧
π₂:= dom_mor qπ₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
Coeq:= EC y z h to_kernel_pair_slice: Coequalizer π₁ π₂
isCoequalizer (dom_mor (PullbackPr1 K))
  (dom_mor (PullbackPr2 K))
  (dom_mor coeq_of_kernel_pair_slice_coeq_arr)
  (CoequalizerEqAr Coeq)
 exact (isCoequalizer_Coequalizer Coeq).
    Defined.
  End CoeqSlice.

  Definition cod_fib_coeqs_of_kernel_pair
    : coeqs_of_kernel_pair (C/x)
    := λ yf zg hp K, coeq_of_kernel_pair_slice hp K.

  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
regular_epi_pb_stable (C / x)

  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
regular_epi_pb_stable (C / x)

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
a, b, c, d: C / x
f: C / x ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C / x ⟦ c, d ⟧
π₁: C / x ⟦ a, b ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ a, c ⟧
p: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
H: isPullback p
Hf: is_regular_epi f
is_regular_epi π₂

π₂: C / x ⟦ a, c ⟧

PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
a, b, c, d: C / x
f: C / x ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C / x ⟦ c, d ⟧
π₁: C / x ⟦ a, b ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ a, c ⟧
p: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
H: isPullback p
Hf: is_regular_epi (dom_mor f)
q: dom_mor π₁ · dom_mor f = dom_mor π₂ · dom_mor g

C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x: C
a, b, c, d: C / x
f: C / x ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C / x ⟦ c, d ⟧
π₁: C / x ⟦ a, b ⟧
π₂: C / x ⟦ a, c ⟧
p: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
H: isPullback p
Hf: is_regular_epi (dom_mor f)
q: dom_mor π₁ · dom_mor f = dom_mor π₂ · dom_mor g
H':= from_is_pullback_slice f g π₁ π₂ q p H: isPullback q
is_regular_epi (dom_mor f)

    exact Hf.
  Qed.

PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C

 exact cod_fib_regular_epi_pb_stable.
  Defined.
End SliceRegular.

(** * 3. Preservation of regular epimorphisms by the pullback functor *)
Section PullbackStable.
  Context {C : category}
          (PB : Pullbacks C)
          (EC : coeqs_of_kernel_pair C)
          (HC : regular_epi_pb_stable C).

  Section PreservesFromStable.
    Context {x y : C}
            (f : x --> y)
            {zg₁ zg₂ : C/y}
            (hp : zg₁ --> zg₂).

    Let z₁ : C := cod_dom zg₁.
    Let z₂ : C := cod_dom zg₂.
    Let g₁ : z₁ --> y := cod_mor zg₁.
    Let g₂ : z₂ --> y := cod_mor zg₂.
    Let h : z₁ --> z₂ := dom_mor hp.

    Let P₁ : Pullback g₁ f := PB _ _ _ g₁ f.
    Let π₁ : P₁ --> z₁ := PullbackPr1 P₁.
    Let π₂ : P₁ --> x := PullbackPr2 P₁.

    Let P₂ : Pullback g₂ f := PB _ _ _ g₂ f.
    Let ρ₁ : P₂ --> z₂ := PullbackPr1 P₂.
    Let ρ₂ : P₂ --> x := PullbackPr2 P₂.

    Context (r : π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f).

    Let k : P₁ --> P₂
      := PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r.

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
π₁ · h = k · ρ₁

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
π₁ · h = k · ρ₁

      
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
k · ρ₁ = π₁ · h

      apply PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1.
    Qed.

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
isPullback
  regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr_eq

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
isPullback
  regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr_eq

      
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
∃! hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'

      
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l')
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'

      
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l')
 
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l')

        
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
ζ₁ = ζ₂

        
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, x0 · π₁ = l × x0 · k = l')

EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f

w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧

ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, x0 · π₁ = l × x0 · k = l')

          
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
x0: C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧
isaprop (x0 · π₁ = l × x0 · k = l')

          apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.

HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C

π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧

ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧

l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧

q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
pr1 ζ₁ = pr1 ζ₂

PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C

g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧

π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧

ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧

w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
pr1 ζ₁ · PullbackPr1 P₁ = pr1 ζ₂ · PullbackPr1 P₁

q: l · h = l' · ρ₁

C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧

π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧

ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧

w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
pr1 ζ₁ · PullbackPr1 P₁ = pr1 ζ₂ · PullbackPr1 P₁
 exact (pr12 ζ₁ @ !(pr12 ζ₂)).
        
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
pr1 ζ₁ · PullbackPr2 P₁ = pr1 ζ₂ · PullbackPr2 P₁
 
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
qr:= maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧, z · PullbackPr2 P₂)
  (pr22 ζ₁ @ ! pr22 ζ₂): (λ z : C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧, z · PullbackPr2 P₂)
  (pr1 ζ₁ · k) =
(λ z : C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧, z · PullbackPr2 P₂)
  (pr1 ζ₂ · k)
pr1 ζ₁ · PullbackPr2 P₁ = pr1 ζ₂ · PullbackPr2 P₁

          
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
qr:= maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧, z · PullbackPr2 P₂)
  (pr22 ζ₁ @ ! pr22 ζ₂): pr1 ζ₁ · k · PullbackPr2 P₂ =
pr1 ζ₂ · k · PullbackPr2 P₂
pr1 ζ₁ · PullbackPr2 P₁ = pr1 ζ₂ · PullbackPr2 P₁

          
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
qr: pr1 ζ₁ · (k · PullbackPr2 P₂) =
pr1 ζ₂ · (k · PullbackPr2 P₂)
pr1 ζ₁ · PullbackPr2 P₁ = pr1 ζ₂ · PullbackPr2 P₁

          
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C

π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧

k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
qr: pr1 ζ₁
· (PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r
   · PullbackPr2 P₂) =
pr1 ζ₂
· (PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r
   · PullbackPr2 P₂)
pr1 ζ₁ · PullbackPr2 P₁ = pr1 ζ₂ · PullbackPr2 P₁

          
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'
qr: pr1 ζ₁ · π₂ = pr1 ζ₂ · π₂
pr1 ζ₁ · PullbackPr2 P₁ = pr1 ζ₂ · PullbackPr2 P₁

          exact qr.

q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
∑ hk : C ⟦ w, P₁ ⟧, hk · π₁ = l × hk · k = l'

PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧

q: l · h = l' · ρ₁

PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂ = ρ₂ · f

            apply PullbackSqrCommutes.
        
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
PullbackArrow P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
     (! mor_eq hp) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
     (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
     (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂)
        q @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
        (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
            l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
           (maponpaths (compose l')
              (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
           (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
        (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
     (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂))) · π₁ = l
 apply PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1.
        
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
(λ _ : PullbackArrow P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
         (maponpaths
            (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
            (! mor_eq hp) @
          internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
            (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
            (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
            (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂) q @
             internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
               (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
               (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
               (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
               (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
                  (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
                   l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
                  (maponpaths (compose l')
                     (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
                  (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
               (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
            (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂))) · π₁ =
       l,
 PullbackArrow P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
   (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
      (! mor_eq hp) @
    internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
      (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
      (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
      (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
      (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂)
         q @
       internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
         (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
         (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
         (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
         (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
            (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
            (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
             l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
            (maponpaths (compose l')
               (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
            (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
         (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
      (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂))) · k = l')
  (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
        (! mor_eq hp) @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
        (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂) q @
         internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
           (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
              (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
              (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
               l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
              (maponpaths (compose l')
                 (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
              (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
           (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
        (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂))))
 
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
PullbackArrow P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
     (! mor_eq hp) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
     (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
     (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂)
        q @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
        (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
            l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
           (maponpaths (compose l')
              (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
           (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
        (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
     (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂))) · k
· PullbackPr1 P₂ = l' · PullbackPr1 P₂
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
PullbackArrow P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
     (! mor_eq hp) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
     (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
     (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂)
        q @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
        (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
            l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
           (maponpaths (compose l')
              (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
           (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
        (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
     (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂))) · k
· PullbackPr2 P₂ = l' · PullbackPr2 P₂

          
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
PullbackArrow P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
     (! mor_eq hp) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
     (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
     (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂)
        q @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
        (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
            l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
           (maponpaths (compose l')
              (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
           (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
        (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
     (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂))) · k
· PullbackPr1 P₂ = l' · PullbackPr1 P₂
 
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
PullbackArrow P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
     (! mor_eq hp) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
     (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
     (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂)
        q @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
        (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
            l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
           (maponpaths (compose l')
              (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
           (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
        (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
     (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂)))
· PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r · PullbackPr1 P₂ =
l' · PullbackPr1 P₂

            
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
PullbackArrow P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
     (! mor_eq hp) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
     (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
     (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂)
        q @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
        (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
            l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
           (maponpaths (compose l')
              (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
           (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
        (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
     (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂)))
· (PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r · PullbackPr1 P₂) =
l' · PullbackPr1 P₂

            
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
PullbackArrow P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
     (! mor_eq hp) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
     (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
     (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂)
        q @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
        (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
            l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
           (maponpaths (compose l')
              (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
           (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
        (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
     (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂))) · (π₁ · h) =
l' · PullbackPr1 P₂

            
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
PullbackArrow P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
     (! mor_eq hp) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
     (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
     (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂)
        q @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
        (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
            l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
           (maponpaths (compose l')
              (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
           (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
        (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
     (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂))) · π₁ · h =
l' · PullbackPr1 P₂

            
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
l · h = l' · PullbackPr1 P₂

            exact q.
          
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
PullbackArrow P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
     (! mor_eq hp) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
     (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
     (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂)
        q @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
        (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
            l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
           (maponpaths (compose l')
              (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
           (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
        (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
     (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂))) · k
· PullbackPr2 P₂ = l' · PullbackPr2 P₂
 
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
PullbackArrow P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
     (! mor_eq hp) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
     (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
     (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂)
        q @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
        (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
            l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
           (maponpaths (compose l')
              (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
           (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
        (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
     (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂)))
· PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r · PullbackPr2 P₂ =
l' · PullbackPr2 P₂

            
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
PullbackArrow P₁ w l (l' · ρ₂)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ cod_dom zg₁, y ⟧, l · z)
     (! mor_eq hp) @
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
     (l · (dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂))
     (l · dom_mor hp · cod_mor zg₂)
     (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ w, z₂ ⟧, z · cod_mor zg₂)
        q @
      internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
        (l' · ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂)
        (l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, p = l' · ρ₂ · f)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (l' · ρ₂ · f) (l' · (ρ₂ · f))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, y ⟧,
            l' · (ρ₁ · cod_mor zg₂) = p)
           (maponpaths (compose l')
              (PullbackSqrCommutes P₂))
           (assoc' l' ρ₂ f))
        (assoc' l' ρ₁ (cod_mor zg₂)))
     (assoc l (dom_mor hp) (cod_mor zg₂)))
· (PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r · PullbackPr2 P₂) =
l' · PullbackPr2 P₂

            
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
w: C
l: C ⟦ w, z₁ ⟧
l': C ⟦ w, P₂ ⟧
q: l · h = l' · ρ₁
l' · ρ₂ = l' · PullbackPr2 P₂

            apply idpath.
    Qed.

    Let HP' := regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr.
    Let P' := make_Pullback _ HP'.

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
HP':= regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr: isPullback regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr_eq
P':= make_Pullback
  regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr_eq
  HP': Pullback h ρ₁
Hp: is_regular_epi hp
is_regular_epi k

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C

g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧

π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧

ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
