HP':= regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr: isPullback regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr_eq
P':= make_Pullback
  regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr_eq
  HP': Pullback h ρ₁
Hp: is_regular_epi hp
is_regular_epi k

      
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
HP':= regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr: isPullback regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr_eq
P':= make_Pullback
  regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr_eq
  HP': Pullback h ρ₁
Hp: is_regular_epi hp
is_regular_epi h

      
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
zg₁, zg₂: C / y
hp: C / y ⟦ zg₁, zg₂ ⟧
z₁:= cod_dom zg₁: C
z₂:= cod_dom zg₂: C
g₁:= cod_mor zg₁: C ⟦ z₁, y ⟧
g₂:= cod_mor zg₂: C ⟦ z₂, y ⟧
h:= dom_mor hp: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
P₁:= PB y z₁ x g₁ f: Pullback g₁ f
π₁:= PullbackPr1 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, z₁ ⟧
π₂:= PullbackPr2 P₁: C ⟦ P₁, x ⟧
P₂:= PB y z₂ x g₂ f: Pullback g₂ f
ρ₁:= PullbackPr1 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, z₂ ⟧
ρ₂:= PullbackPr2 P₂: C ⟦ P₂, x ⟧
r: π₁ · h · g₂ = π₂ · f
k:= PullbackArrow P₂ P₁ (π₁ · h) π₂ r: C ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧
HP':= regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr: isPullback regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr_eq
P':= make_Pullback
  regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_pb_sqr_eq
  HP': Pullback h ρ₁
Hp: is_regular_epi hp
is_regular_epi hp

      exact Hp.
    Qed.
  End PreservesFromStable.

  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_regular_epi (cod_pb PB f)

  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_regular_epi (cod_pb PB f)

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: C / y
p: C / y ⟦ g, h ⟧
Hp: is_regular_epi p
is_regular_epi (# (cod_pb PB f) p)

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: C / y
p: C / y ⟦ g, h ⟧
Hp: is_regular_epi p
is_regular_epi (dom_mor (# (cod_pb PB f) p))

    
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: C / y
p: C / y ⟦ g, h ⟧
Hp: is_regular_epi p
is_regular_epi (dom_mor (cod_fiber_functor_pb PB f p))

    exact (regular_epi_pb_stable_to_pb_preserves_lem f p _ Hp).
  Qed.
End PullbackStable.

(** * 4. Preservation of regular epimorphisms by the codomain functor *)

C₁, C₂: category
PB: Pullbacks C₁
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C₁
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_regular_epi F
x: C₁
preserves_regular_epi
  (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)


C₁, C₂: category
PB: Pullbacks C₁
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C₁
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_regular_epi F
x: C₁
preserves_regular_epi
  (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
PB: Pullbacks C₁
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C₁
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_regular_epi F
x: C₁
fy, gz: (disp_codomain C₁)[{x}]
hp: (disp_codomain C₁)[{x}] ⟦ fy, gz ⟧
Hf: is_regular_epi hp
is_regular_epi
  (# (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x) hp)

  
C₁, C₂: category
PB: Pullbacks C₁
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C₁
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_regular_epi F
x: C₁
fy, gz: (disp_codomain C₁)[{x}]
hp: (disp_codomain C₁)[{x}] ⟦ fy, gz ⟧
Hf: is_regular_epi hp
is_regular_epi
  (dom_mor
     (# (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x) hp))

  
C₁, C₂: category
PB: Pullbacks C₁
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C₁
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_regular_epi F
x: C₁
fy, gz: (disp_codomain C₁)[{x}]
hp: (disp_codomain C₁)[{x}] ⟦ fy, gz ⟧
Hf: is_regular_epi hp
is_regular_epi (# F (dom_mor hp))

  
C₁, C₂: category
PB: Pullbacks C₁
EC: coeqs_of_kernel_pair C₁
HC: regular_epi_pb_stable C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_regular_epi F
x: C₁
fy, gz: (disp_codomain C₁)[{x}]
hp: (disp_codomain C₁)[{x}] ⟦ fy, gz ⟧
Hf: is_regular_epi hp
is_regular_epi (dom_mor hp)

  exact (from_regular_epi_in_slice PB EC HC Hf).
Defined.

(** * 5. Exactness of the slice category *)

C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
f = g


C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
f = g

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
f · cod_mor R =
cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (f · cod_mor R))
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
g · cod_mor R =
cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (f · cod_mor R))
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
make_cod_fib_mor f ?p · internal_relation_src R =
make_cod_fib_mor g ?p0 · internal_relation_src R
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
make_cod_fib_mor f ?p · internal_relation_tar R =
make_cod_fib_mor g ?p0 · internal_relation_tar R

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
f · cod_mor R =
cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (f · cod_mor R))
 apply idpath.
  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
g · cod_mor R =
cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (f · cod_mor R))
 
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
g · cod_mor R = f · cod_mor R

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
g · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) · cod_mor zf) =
f · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) · cod_mor zf)

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) · cod_mor zf =
f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) · cod_mor zf

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)

    exact (!p).
  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
make_cod_fib_mor f
  (idpath (cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (f · cod_mor R))))
· internal_relation_src R =
make_cod_fib_mor g
  (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
     (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) · cod_mor zf)
     (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧, g · p = f · p)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
        (g
         · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf))
        (g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
         · cod_mor zf)
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
         p =
         f
         · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
           (f
            · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf))
           (f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf)
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
            g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf = p)
           (maponpaths_2 compose (! p) (cod_mor zf))
           (assoc f
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
              (cod_mor zf)))
        (assoc g (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
           (cod_mor zf))) (cod_mor R)
     (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R))
   :
   g · cod_mor R =
   cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (f · cod_mor R)))
· internal_relation_src R
 
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor f
     (idpath
        (cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (f · cod_mor R))))
   · internal_relation_src R) =
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor g
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
        (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
         · cod_mor zf)
        (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧, g · p = f · p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
           (g
            · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf))
           (g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf)
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
            p =
            f
            · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf))
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
              (f
               · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
                  · cod_mor zf))
              (f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf)
              (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
               g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf = p)
              (maponpaths_2 compose (! p) (cod_mor zf))
              (assoc f
                 (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
                 (cod_mor zf)))
           (assoc g
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
              (cod_mor zf))) (cod_mor R)
        (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R))
      :
      g · cod_mor R =
      cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (f · cod_mor R)))
   · internal_relation_src R)

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor f
     (idpath
        (cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (f · cod_mor R)))))
· dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor g
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
        (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
         · cod_mor zf)
        (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧, g · p = f · p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
           (g
            · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf))
           (g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf)
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
            p =
            f
            · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf))
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
              (f
               · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
                  · cod_mor zf))
              (f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf)
              (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
               g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf = p)
              (maponpaths_2 compose (! p) (cod_mor zf))
              (assoc f
                 (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
                 (cod_mor zf)))
           (assoc g
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
              (cod_mor zf))) (cod_mor R)
        (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R))))
· dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)

    exact p.

q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
make_cod_fib_mor f
  (idpath (cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (f · cod_mor R))))
· internal_relation_tar R =
make_cod_fib_mor g
  (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
     (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) · cod_mor zf)
     (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧, g · p = f · p)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
        (g
         · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf))

         p =

            · cod_mor zf))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
           (f
            · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf))
           (f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf)
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧,
            g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf = p)

           (cod_mor zf))) (cod_mor R)
     (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R))

   cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (f · cod_mor R)))
· internal_relation_tar R

x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor f
     (idpath
        (cod_mor (make_cod_fib_ob (f · cod_mor R)))))
· dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor g
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
        (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
         · cod_mor zf)
        (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧, g · p = f · p)

           (g

            · cod_mor zf)

            p =
            f

               · cod_mor zf))
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
              (f

              (f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf)

               g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf = p)
              (maponpaths_2 compose (! p) (cod_mor zf))
              (assoc f
                 (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))

· dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
w: C
f, g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
q: f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)

    exact q.
Qed.


C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
internal_relation (cod_dom zf)


C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
internal_relation (cod_dom zf)

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
C
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
C ⟦ ?r, cod_dom zf ⟧
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
C ⟦ ?r, cod_dom zf ⟧
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
∏ (w : C) (f g : C ⟦ w, ?r ⟧),
f · ?s = g · ?s → f · ?t = g · ?t → f = g

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
C
 exact (cod_dom R).
  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
C ⟦ cod_dom R, cod_dom zf ⟧
 exact (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)).
  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
C ⟦ cod_dom R, cod_dom zf ⟧
 exact (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)).
  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_relation zf
∏ (w : C) (f g : C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧),
f · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) =
g · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
→ f · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) =
  g · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) → f = g
 exact (from_internal_relation_slice_monic R).
Defined.


C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
internal_isrefl (from_internal_relation_slice R)


C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
internal_isrefl (from_internal_relation_slice R)

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
internal_relation_to_arr_hrel
  (from_internal_relation_slice R) w g g

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧

  (from_internal_relation_slice R) w g g

w: C

h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
?h · internal_relation_src R = g₁'

x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
?h · internal_relation_tar R = g₂'

x: C
zf: C / x

g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧

p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧

C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
h · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R

        apply idpath.
    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
make_cod_fib_mor h
  (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧)
     (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
     (λ g₁ : C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧,
      h · cod_mor R = g₁ · cod_mor zf)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
        (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
         · cod_mor zf)
        (h
         · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, h · cod_mor R = p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
           (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf) (cod_mor R)
           (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧,
            h · cod_mor R = h · p)
           (idpath (h · cod_mor R))
           (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R)))
        (assoc' h (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
           (cod_mor zf))) g₁ p₁
   :
   h · cod_mor R = cod_mor w')
· internal_relation_src R = g₁'
 
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor h
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧)
        (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
        (λ g₁ : C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧,
         h · cod_mor R = g₁ · cod_mor zf)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
           (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf)
           (h
            · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, h · cod_mor R = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf) (cod_mor R)
              (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧,
               h · cod_mor R = h · p)
              (idpath (h · cod_mor R))
              (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R)))
           (assoc' h
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
              (cod_mor zf))) g₁ p₁
      :
      h · cod_mor R = cod_mor w')
   · internal_relation_src R) = dom_mor g₁'

      
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor h
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧)
        (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
        (λ g₁ : C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧,
         h · cod_mor R = g₁ · cod_mor zf)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
           (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf)
           (h
            · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, h · cod_mor R = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf) (cod_mor R)
              (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧,
               h · cod_mor R = h · p)
              (idpath (h · cod_mor R))
              (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R)))
           (assoc' h
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
              (cod_mor zf))) g₁ p₁))
· dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = dom_mor g₁'

      
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂

q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'

q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'

h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁

      exact p₁.
    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
make_cod_fib_mor h
  (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧)
     (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
     (λ g₁ : C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧,
      h · cod_mor R = g₁ · cod_mor zf)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
        (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
         · cod_mor zf)
        (h
         · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, h · cod_mor R = p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
           (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf) (cod_mor R)
           (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧,
            h · cod_mor R = h · p)
           (idpath (h · cod_mor R))
           (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R)))
        (assoc' h (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
           (cod_mor zf))) g₁ p₁
   :
   h · cod_mor R = cod_mor w')
· internal_relation_tar R = g₂'

zf: C / x

p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂

q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'

dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor h
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧)
        (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
        (λ g₁ : C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧,
         h · cod_mor R = g₁ · cod_mor zf)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
           (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf)

               · cod_mor zf))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, h · cod_mor R = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf) (cod_mor R)
              (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧,
               h · cod_mor R = h · p)
              (idpath (h · cod_mor R))
              (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R)))
           (assoc' h
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
              (cod_mor zf))) g₁ p₁
      :
      h · cod_mor R = cod_mor w')
   · internal_relation_tar R) = dom_mor g₂'

p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂

q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'

  (make_cod_fib_mor h
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧)
        (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))

              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf) (cod_mor R)
              (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧,
               h · cod_mor R = h · p)
              (idpath (h · cod_mor R))
              (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R)))
           (assoc' h
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
              (cod_mor zf))) g₁ p₁))
· dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = dom_mor g₂'

      
C: category

zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧

p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂

q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'

q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'

C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
internal_relation_to_arr_hrel
  (from_internal_relation_slice R) w g₂ g₁

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
r:= issymm_internal_eqrel R w' g₁' g₂' H
:
internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₂' g₁': internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₂' g₁'
internal_relation_to_arr_hrel
  (from_internal_relation_slice R) w g₂ g₁

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
r:= issymm_internal_eqrel R w' g₁' g₂' H
:
internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₂' g₁': internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₂' g₁'
C ⟦ w, from_internal_relation_slice R ⟧

x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
r:= issymm_internal_eqrel R w' g₁' g₂' H
:
internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₂' g₁': internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₂' g₁'
?h
· internal_relation_src
    (from_internal_relation_slice R) = g₂

p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x

C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
r:= issymm_internal_eqrel R w' g₁' g₂' H
:
internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₂' g₁': internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₂' g₁'
C ⟦ w, from_internal_relation_slice R ⟧
 exact (dom_mor r).

x: C
zf: C / x

w: C

p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂

x: C

C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
r:= issymm_internal_eqrel R w' g₁' g₂' H
:
internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₂' g₁': internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₂' g₁'
dom_mor (r · internal_relation_tar R) = g₁

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
q₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ q₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
q₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ q₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
r:= issymm_internal_eqrel R w' g₁' g₂' H
:
internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₂' g₁': internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₂' g₁'
dom_mor g₁' = g₁

    apply idpath.
Qed.

C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) · cod_mor zf =
h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) · cod_mor zf

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧

p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂

q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃

h · (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) · cod_mor zf) =
h · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) · cod_mor zf)

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
h · (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) · cod_mor zf) =
h · cod_mor R

    apply idpath.

k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ r₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
lem: k · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R
k · (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) · cod_mor zf) =
h · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) · cod_mor zf)

x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧

p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂

q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'

h · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R

        apply idpath.

g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ r₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
lem: k · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R
r₃: g₃ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₃':= make_cod_fib_mor g₃ r₃: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
make_cod_fib_mor h
  (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧)
     (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
     (λ g₁ : C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧,
      h · cod_mor R = g₁ · cod_mor zf)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
        (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
         · cod_mor zf)
        (h
         · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, h · cod_mor R = p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
           (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf) (cod_mor R)
           (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧,
            h · cod_mor R = h · p)
           (idpath (h · cod_mor R))
           (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R)))
        (assoc' h (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
           (cod_mor zf))) g₁ p₁
   :
   h · cod_mor R = cod_mor w')
· internal_relation_src R = g₁'
 
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ r₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
lem: k · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R
r₃: g₃ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₃':= make_cod_fib_mor g₃ r₃: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor h
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧)
        (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
        (λ g₁ : C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧,
         h · cod_mor R = g₁ · cod_mor zf)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
           (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf)
           (h
            · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, h · cod_mor R = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf) (cod_mor R)
              (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧,
               h · cod_mor R = h · p)
              (idpath (h · cod_mor R))
              (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R)))
           (assoc' h
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
              (cod_mor zf))) g₁ p₁
      :
      h · cod_mor R = cod_mor w')
   · internal_relation_src R) = dom_mor g₁'

      
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ r₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
lem: k · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R
r₃: g₃ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₃':= make_cod_fib_mor g₃ r₃: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁

      exact p₁.

· internal_relation_tar R = g₂'

k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ r₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
lem: k · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R
r₃: g₃ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₃':= make_cod_fib_mor g₃ r₃: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H₁: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
?g · cod_mor R = cod_mor w'

x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂

q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃

r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'

g₃':= make_cod_fib_mor g₃ r₃: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H₁: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
C ⟦ cod_dom w', cod_dom R ⟧
 exact k.

p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'

        exact lem.
    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ r₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
lem: k · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R
r₃: g₃ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₃':= make_cod_fib_mor g₃ r₃: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H₁: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
make_cod_fib_mor k
  (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧)
     (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
     (λ g₁ : C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧,
      k · cod_mor R = g₁ · cod_mor zf)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
        (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
         · cod_mor zf)
        (h
         · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf))
        (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, k · cod_mor R = p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
           (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf) (cod_mor R)
           (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧,
            k · cod_mor R = h · p) lem
           (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R)))
        (assoc' h (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
           (cod_mor zf))) g₁ p₁
   :
   k · cod_mor R = cod_mor w')
· internal_relation_src R = g₂'
 
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ r₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
lem: k · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R
r₃: g₃ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₃':= make_cod_fib_mor g₃ r₃: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H₁: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
dom_mor
  (make_cod_fib_mor k
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧)
        (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
        (λ g₁ : C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧,
         k · cod_mor R = g₁ · cod_mor zf)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)
           (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
            · cod_mor zf)
           (h
            · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf))
           (λ p : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, k · cod_mor R = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧)
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
               · cod_mor zf) (cod_mor R)
              (λ p : C ⟦ cod_dom R, x ⟧,
               k · cod_mor R = h · p) lem
              (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R)))
           (assoc' h
              (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
              (cod_mor zf))) g₁ p₁
      :
      k · cod_mor R = cod_mor w')
   · internal_relation_src R) = dom_mor g₂'

H₁: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂

      exact q₁.

make_cod_fib_mor k
  (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧)
     (h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
     (λ g₁ : C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧,

         · cod_mor zf)
        (h
         · (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)

   :
   k · cod_mor R = cod_mor w')
· internal_relation_tar R = g₃'

C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ r₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
lem: k · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R
r₃: g₃ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₃':= make_cod_fib_mor g₃ r₃: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H₁: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
H₂: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₂' g₃'
internal_relation_to_arr_hrel
  (from_internal_relation_slice R) w g₁ g₃

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ r₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
lem: k · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R
r₃: g₃ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₃':= make_cod_fib_mor g₃ r₃: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H₁: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
H₂: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₂' g₃'
r:= istrans_internal_eqrel R w' g₁' g₂' g₃' H₁ H₂: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₃'
internal_relation_to_arr_hrel
  (from_internal_relation_slice R) w g₁ g₃

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ r₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
lem: k · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R
r₃: g₃ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₃':= make_cod_fib_mor g₃ r₃: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H₁: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
H₂: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₂' g₃'
r:= istrans_internal_eqrel R w' g₁' g₂' g₃' H₁ H₂: internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₁' g₃'
internal_relation_to_arr_hrel
  (from_internal_relation_slice R) w g₁ g₃

p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂

q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃

H₁: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
H₂: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₂' g₃'
r:= istrans_internal_eqrel R w' g₁' g₂' g₃' H₁ H₂: internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₁' g₃'
C ⟦ w, from_internal_relation_slice R ⟧

x: C

w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧

p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂

C ⟦ w, from_internal_relation_slice R ⟧

x: C
zf: C / x

w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧

p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'

dom_mor (r · internal_relation_src R) = g₁

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x

r:= istrans_internal_eqrel R w' g₁' g₂' g₃' H₁ H₂: internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₁' g₃'
dom_mor g₁' = g₁

    apply idpath.

C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ r₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
lem: k · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R
r₃: g₃ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₃':= make_cod_fib_mor g₃ r₃: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H₁: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
H₂: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₂' g₃'
r:= istrans_internal_eqrel R w' g₁' g₂' g₃' H₁ H₂: internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₁' g₃'
dom_mor (r · internal_relation_tar R) = g₃

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
w: C
g₁, g₂, g₃: C ⟦ w, cod_dom zf ⟧
h: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
p₁: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₁
p₂: h · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₂
k: C ⟦ w, cod_dom R ⟧
q₁: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) = g₂
q₂: k · dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) = g₃
w':= make_cod_fib_ob (g₁ · cod_mor zf): C / x
r₁: g₁ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₁':= make_cod_fib_mor g₁ r₁: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
r₂: g₂ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₂':= make_cod_fib_mor g₂ r₂: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
lem: k · cod_mor R = h · cod_mor R
r₃: g₃ · cod_mor zf = cod_mor w'
g₃':= make_cod_fib_mor g₃ r₃: C / x ⟦ w', zf ⟧
H₁: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₁' g₂'
H₂: internal_relation_to_arr_hrel R w' g₂' g₃'
r:= istrans_internal_eqrel R w' g₁' g₂' g₃' H₁ H₂: internal_relation_to_arr_relation R g₁' g₃'
dom_mor g₃' = g₃

    apply idpath.
Qed.

 exact (isrefl_from_internal_is_eqrel_slice R).

 exact (istrans_from_internal_is_eqrel_slice R).

 exact (from_internal_relation_slice R).
  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
internal_iseqrel (from_internal_relation_slice R)
 exact (from_internal_is_eqrel_slice R).
Defined.

Section Exactness.
  Context {C : category}
          {x : C}
          {zf : C/x}
          (R : internal_eqrel zf)
          (Coeq : Coequalizer
                    (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
                    (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))).

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
C / x

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
C / x

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
C
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
C ⟦ ?x, x ⟧

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
C
 exact Coeq.
    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
C ⟦ Coeq, x ⟧
 
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
C ⟦ cod_dom zf, x ⟧
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) · ?h =
dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) · ?h

      
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
C ⟦ cod_dom zf, x ⟧
 exact (cod_mor zf).
      
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
dom_mor (internal_relation_src R) · cod_mor zf =
dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R) · cod_mor zf
 abstract
          (rewrite (mor_eq (internal_relation_src R)) ;
           rewrite (mor_eq (internal_relation_tar R)) ;
           apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
C / x ⟦ zf, internal_eqrel_coequalizer_ob ⟧

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
C / x ⟦ zf, internal_eqrel_coequalizer_ob ⟧

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
C ⟦ cod_dom zf, cod_dom internal_eqrel_coequalizer_ob
⟧
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
?g · cod_mor internal_eqrel_coequalizer_ob =
cod_mor zf

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
C ⟦ cod_dom zf, cod_dom internal_eqrel_coequalizer_ob
⟧
 exact (CoequalizerArrow Coeq).
    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
CoequalizerArrow Coeq
· cod_mor internal_eqrel_coequalizer_ob = cod_mor zf
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite CoequalizerCommutes ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
internal_relation_src R
· internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr =
internal_relation_tar R
· internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr

  
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
internal_relation_src R
· internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr =
internal_relation_tar R
· internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
dom_mor
  (internal_relation_src R
   · internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr) =
dom_mor
  (internal_relation_tar R
   · internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr)

    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
· dom_mor internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr =
dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
· dom_mor internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr

    apply CoequalizerEqAr.
  Qed.

zf: C / x

Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))

  (internal_relation_tar R)

  ?e ?H

  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
C / x
 exact internal_eqrel_coequalizer_ob.
    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))

 exact internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr.

x: C
zf: C / x

  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
internal_relation_src R
· internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr =
internal_relation_tar R
· internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr
 exact internal_eqrel_coequalizer_eq.
    
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
isCoequalizer (internal_relation_src R)
  (internal_relation_tar R)
  internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr
  internal_eqrel_coequalizer_eq
 
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
· dom_mor internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr =
dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
· dom_mor internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
isCoequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
  (dom_mor internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr) 
  ?p'

      
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
dom_mor (internal_relation_src R)
· dom_mor internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr =
dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R)
· dom_mor internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr
 apply CoequalizerEqAr.
      
C: category
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
Coeq: Coequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
isCoequalizer (dom_mor (internal_relation_src R))
  (dom_mor (internal_relation_tar R))
  (dom_mor internal_eqrel_coequalizer_arr)
  (CoequalizerEqAr Coeq)
 exact (isCoequalizer_Coequalizer Coeq).
  Defined.
End Exactness.


C: category
H: all_internal_eqrel_effective C
x: C
all_internal_eqrel_effective (C / x)

x: C
all_internal_eqrel_effective (C / x)

x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
is_effective R

H: all_internal_eqrel_effective C
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
HE:= H (cod_dom zf) (from_internal_eqrel_slice R): is_effective (from_internal_eqrel_slice R)
is_effective R

  
C: category
H: all_internal_eqrel_effective C
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
HE:= H (cod_dom zf) (from_internal_eqrel_slice R): is_effective (from_internal_eqrel_slice R)
Coeq:= pr1 HE: Coequalizer
  (internal_relation_src
     (from_internal_eqrel_slice R))
  (internal_relation_tar
     (from_internal_eqrel_slice R))
is_effective R

  
C: category
H: all_internal_eqrel_effective C
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
HE:= H (cod_dom zf) (from_internal_eqrel_slice R): is_effective (from_internal_eqrel_slice R)
Coeq:= pr1 HE: Coequalizer
  (internal_relation_src
     (from_internal_eqrel_slice R))
  (internal_relation_tar
     (from_internal_eqrel_slice R))
Coequalizer (internal_relation_src R)
  (internal_relation_tar R)
C: category
H: all_internal_eqrel_effective C
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
HE:= H (cod_dom zf) (from_internal_eqrel_slice R): is_effective (from_internal_eqrel_slice R)
Coeq:= pr1 HE: Coequalizer
  (internal_relation_src
     (from_internal_eqrel_slice R))
  (internal_relation_tar
     (from_internal_eqrel_slice R))
(λ Coeq : Coequalizer (internal_relation_src R)
            (internal_relation_tar R),
 isPullback (CoequalizerEqAr Coeq)) 
  ?pr1

  
C: category
H: all_internal_eqrel_effective C
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
HE:= H (cod_dom zf) (from_internal_eqrel_slice R): is_effective (from_internal_eqrel_slice R)
Coeq:= pr1 HE: Coequalizer
  (internal_relation_src
     (from_internal_eqrel_slice R))
  (internal_relation_tar
     (from_internal_eqrel_slice R))
Coequalizer (internal_relation_src R)
  (internal_relation_tar R)
 exact (internal_eqrel_coequalizer R Coeq).
  
C: category
H: all_internal_eqrel_effective C
x: C
zf: C / x
R: internal_eqrel zf
HE:= H (cod_dom zf) (from_internal_eqrel_slice R): is_effective (from_internal_eqrel_slice R)
Coeq:= pr1 HE: Coequalizer
  (internal_relation_src
     (from_internal_eqrel_slice R))
  (internal_relation_tar
     (from_internal_eqrel_slice R))
(λ Coeq : Coequalizer (internal_relation_src R)
            (internal_relation_tar R),
 isPullback (CoequalizerEqAr Coeq))
  (internal_eqrel_coequalizer R Coeq)
 abstract
      (use to_is_pullback_slice ; [ | apply HE ]).
Defined.
